lines.speaker: Teicuh
lines.text: Nilsal, iknami. Are you in need of some runes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do you get your runes from?

lines.speaker: Teicuh
lines.text: A few different places. Used to be that they were mostly from old stockpiles or from trading with the Dwarves of Cam Torum. Now that trade has opened with the east, I get a lot imported as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Old stockpiles? What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Teicuh
lines.text: The Old Ones had some way to create runes, but we've never discovered how they did so. I'm guessing the dwarves did though, given they never seem to run short on them...

lines.speaker: Teicuh
lines.text: Anyway, after they died, the Old Ones left plenty of runes behind. Some of the earliest settlers here then stockpiled them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Teicuh
lines.text: Don't mention it, iknami. Now, would you like to buy some runes?

lines.speaker: Teicuh
lines.text: Fair enough, iknami. Timoiva for now.
